goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Active generated rows now have complete provenance and both transaction repairs are atomic. Obsolete-manual rows still retain and render stale sourceRecipeIds and numeric contribution claims. Intake keys are not retry-stable across rejected fetches or concurrent clicks because the key is persisted only after a Response arrives.

worker_package.objective: Clear stale generated claims from retained obsolete-manual rows and make intake operation keys persist before dispatch and rotate only after confirmed success, with focused regressions.
verify: pnpm exec prettier --check <T019 allowed source, tests, and docs>
pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/pantry-grocery-cooking.test.ts tests/unit/cooking.test.ts
stop_if: Migration history or schema must change.
Manual item values would be overwritten.
Retry stability cannot be achieved inside allowed files.
Audited Pantry boundaries or concurrent work would regress.

evidence: Obsolete overridden rows change demandState but retain generated source and numeric provenance.
The UI renders stored contributions for manual obsolete rows.
Client intake operation keys are stored only after fetch returns.
Active-row provenance, atomic overrides, atomic undo conflicts, FEFO, origins, and ActorContext are sound.

parallel_safety.rationale: The remaining persistence and client state seams share focused tests and documentation.

missing_evidence: Fresh safe gates, build, rendered workflow, accessibility, and final oracle
required_board_updates: Require another Judge before final verification.
